subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The contents of thy sweet letter became known and understood. Whatsoever lamentation and cry thou mayest raise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق مضامین نامه شکرین معلوم و مفهوم گشت هر چه ناله و فغان نماای
subcodes.subjects: @status of kings; future of monarchy, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant
